name: Propose a new banned word or phrase

## The word or phrase

What you want added to the banned list.

## Why it is an AI tell

A one-sentence reason. Why is this word or phrase a fingerprint of LLM-default writing?

## Public examples (three or more)

Paste at least three examples of this word or phrase appearing in obvious AI-generated content. Screenshots or URLs are best. Different models or sources strengthen the case.

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Which era

- [ ] Era 1 (2023 to mid-2024)
- [ ] Era 2 (mid-2024 to mid-2025)
- [ ] Era 3 (mid-2025 onward)
- [ ] Universally overused (transcends era)

## Suggested replacement

If the word has a natural human equivalent, what is it?

## Language

- [ ] English
- [ ] Spanish (Latino)
- [ ] Spanish (Castilian)
- [ ] Other (specify)
